The first step in hacking a social media account is to gather as much information about the target as possible. Step 1: Identify your target
Before you start any hacking activity, it is essential to identify the person or entity you want to hack. In this case, we will pretend that our target is a social media account belonging to a friend of yours who has an account on a popular social networking site such as Facebook, Twitter, or Instagram.

Step 2: Gather information about your target
The next step is to gather as much information as you can about the target. This includes their name, email address, and any other personal information that may be available online.
